daily.topThemeBody: Brookings argues AI evolves too fast for traditional randomized trials and pitches 'implementation R&D,' EdTech Digest profiles a push to make AI writing tools reveal student thinking rather than police it, and EdTech Magazine tracks ambient classroom AI and Florida State's vendor vetting — the field arguing over how to trust the tools, not just adopt them.

themes.title: The Perimeter Is People and Records

heroWeek.themeBody: Canvas paused data delivery over a potential security threat, while SonicWall found 61% of exploits land within 48 hours of proof-of-concept and 77% of organizations take over a week to patch.
heroWeek.promptSeed: Flat minimal editorial vector illustration for an EdTech digest hero. Theme: Core Systems Under Strain - Canvas paused data delivery over a potential security threat, while SonicWall found 61% of exploits land within 48 hours of proof-of-concept and 77% of organizations take over a week to patch.. Follow the published style guide (palette, composition, negative prompt).
